purpose: Baseline captured BEFORE any runtime restructuring, so later checkpoints can prove no >2% hot-path regression (prompt §17).

pending_requires_infra.note: These need Postgres + MinIO + native Metal (and CUDA hardware) and are captured at the Phase C/E measurement gates, not at census time.

regression_policy: Investigate any hot-path regression > 2%. No condensed checkpoint may improve LOC while worsening throughput, latency, memory, build/proof reliability, crash recovery, security, or payment correctness.
